Live Closet View

See inside our equipment closet in real time

Camera Currently Offline

Available Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM CT

Check back during business hours for a live view.

What's Available

Quick counts by category:

Manual Wheelchair—
Power Wheelchair—
Cushion / Seating—
Walker / Rollator—
Bath / Shower Equipment—
Transfer Equipment—
Ramp / Accessibility—
Scooter—
Standing Frame—
Other Adaptive Equipment—
View full inventory →

About This View

This live view is provided to increase transparency and awareness of available equipment.

Inventory shown in the camera view may not reflect all items currently available. Inventory changes quickly.

For the most accurate information, check the inventory portal or contact us directly.

Helping Tennesseans with spinal cord injuries and related mobility disabilities access refurbished wheelchairs, adaptive equipment, and supplies at no cost.

Funded by the Craig H. Neilsen Foundation
